mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM user_role ur JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE r.role_code = 'TEACHER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM course_enrollment WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(review_count), 0) AS reviewCount, ROUND(SUM(avg_score * review_count) / NULLIF(SUM(review_count), 0), 1) AS avgScore FROM course WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM `user` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(last_learn_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS count FROM course_enrollment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND last_learn_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(last_learn_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(last_learn_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM course WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, ROUND(student_count * 0.4 + like_count * 0.3 + favorite_count * 0.3, 2) AS value FROM course WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id AS courseId, course_name AS courseName, student_count AS value FROM course WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY student_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT rating AS rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM course_review WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM `user` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND create_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(create_time, enroll_time), '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM course_enrollment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (create_time IS NOT NULL OR enroll_time IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(create_time, enroll_time), '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
